title: Global EV sales hit 4M in Q1 2026, but growth is uneven
content: Global EV sales are still huge, but they’re not moving in the same direction everywhere: New data from Benchmark Mineral Intelligence shows 4 million electric vehicles were sold worldwide in Q1 2026, down 3% year over year.

title: Ionna Is Teaming Up With Circle K To Boost Its EV Charging Network
content: Even as EV sales cool in the U.S., Ionna’s charger expansion continues to move forward aggressively.

title: HSBC Research Expects Supply-Demand Imbalance to Lift Short-term Lithium Prices; Raises Ganfeng Lithium (01772.HK) and Tianqi Lithium (09696.HK) TP - AASTOCKS.com
